title: Helicops 1 Find Your Wings
description: In a world of normal policemen, an underground organisation of anthropomorphic helicopters take on the cases too extreme for humans to handle. Veteran Helicop detective Rotary is one hour from retirement when his partner in crime (solving) is mysteriously killed... He is forced to train a naïve new recruit, Ace, while confronting his own shortcomings. 'HELICOPS: FIND YOUR WINGS' is a surreal, high-energy, comedy-noir detective drama (with songs). From the team who brought you the critically-acclaimed alt comedy shows: 'Blood Brothers: A Story for Our Times', 'Pasta Pinata: The Game Show Where You Can Win Eternal Life', and 'The Lost Play of Barry Wayworm' Past praise for Stolen Table: ★★★★★ 'Anarchic...chaotic energy' - The Crumb Best Shows of Brighton Fringe 2023 - ChrisOnTheatre

venue.name: Junk Poets at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peters Church, York Place, East Sussex
